variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14595 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14595 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14595 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4645 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14595
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4645 air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
